info.name: M3lesh APIs
info.description:
Admin: all APIs under /api/admin require Bearer token.
User: public read-only APIs under /api/user (no token) plus authenticated APIs with Bearer token.

News categories: use /api/admin/news/categories and /api/user/news/categories. Topic FCM broadcasts: /api/admin/notification-broadcasts (list/show) and /api/admin/notification-broadcasts/send.

Full enum/status tables: **postman/API_FIELD_VALUES.md**.

- **Base URL (local vs live):** Import the environments from this folder (m3lesh-local.postman_environment.json, m3lesh-live.postman_environment.json), then use the environment dropdown in the top-right to switch between Local (http://localhost:8000) and Live (https://m3leshapp.oraixen.com).
- Image uploads: use form-data (multipart), not JSON body.
- Allowed values for status/priority/enums: see `postman/API_FIELD_VALUES.md` and each request’s **Description** in Postman. Do **not** send documentation-only keys in JSON bodies (they fail validation).
- Locale: Accept-Language header (en or ar). Variables: base_url, admin_token, user_token, lang.
- Pagination: ?per_page=15&page=1 (max 100). Sort: ?sort_by=column&sort_order=asc|desc

item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin requests: log in first, then use the token in the Authorization header.

formdata.description: Required: one or more numeric IDs (user ids if recipient_type=user, admin ids if admin). Repeat key for multiple IDs.
Optional deep-link hint (e.g. news, shop). Max 50 chars.
Optional JSON string; stored as notification data.

request.description: Multipart **form-data**. For **all users** FCM broadcast use **Notification broadcasts → Send** (`/notification-broadcasts/send`), not this endpoint.
Returns JSON with **unread_count** (integer) for the authenticated admin. Same Bearer token and permissions as **List** (`view_notifications` or `send_notifications`).

item.name: Notification broadcasts
item.description: FCM topic broadcasts (persisted as NotificationBroadcast). Send: multipart form — topic (e.g. AllUsers), title, body; optional target_type, target_id, data_json, image.

item.name: Jobs
item.description: Admin CRUD and approve/reject. Requires Bearer {{admin_token}}.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Senior Developer",
  "description": "Full-time position. Requirements: 5+ years experience.",
  "company_name": "Acme Corp",
  "location": "Cairo, Egypt",
  "user_id": 1,
  "status": "pending",
  "is_active": true
}

item.name: Events
item.description: Admin CRUD and approve/reject. Requires Bearer {{admin_token}}.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Tech Meetup",
  "description": "Monthly meetup for developers.",
  "location": "Cairo, Egypt",
  "start_at": "2026-03-15T18:00:00",
  "end_at": "2026-03-15T20:00:00",
  "user_id": 1,
  "status": "pending",
  "is_active": true
}

request.description: **status** (when present): `pending` | `approved` | `rejected`. See `postman/API_FIELD_VALUES.md`.
JSON only (not multipart). **priority:** `normal` | `urgent`. **images:** optional array of **string** paths/URLs (`max:1000` each), not file uploads.
**priority:** `normal` | `urgent`. **images:** string paths array (optional).

JSON body (not multipart). **image:** string storage path or URL (`max:2000`), not a file upload.

**action_type:** `shop` | `product` | `directory_listing` | `external_url`.

**action_value:** numeric id for shop/product/listing, or full URL for `external_url`.

**priority:** `normal` | `featured`.
Same value rules as Create; all fields optional except as per `UpdateAdRequest`. **image** is string path/URL if sent.

body.raw:
{ "title_ar": "عنوان الصفحة", "content_ar": "

محتوى عربي HTML

", "title_en": "Page Title", "content_en": "

English HTML content

", "is_active": true }

request.description: content_ar and content_en are HTML (e.g. from RichEditor).

item.name: Support Tickets
item.description: Admin CRUD, status/priority, and logs. Requires Bearer {{admin_token}}.

request.description:
With **user_id**: ticket linked to user (visitor fields ignored). Without **user_id**: require **visitor_name** and **visitor_phone** or **visitor_email**.

**priority:** `low` | `normal` | `high` (optional). **attachments:** array of path strings in JSON if needed. Status is set by server (`open`). See `postman/API_FIELD_VALUES.md`.
**priority:** `low` | `normal` | `high`. **status:** `open` | `in_progress` | `closed` (optional on full update). **attachments:** string paths array if used.
**status:** `open` | `in_progress` | `closed`.
**priority:** `low` | `normal` | `high`.

formdata.description: Optional. jpeg, jpg, png, gif, webp, pdf. Max 5MB each.

request.description: Multipart **form-data**. Either **message** or at least one **attachments[]** file is required.

body.raw:
{
  "marketplace_category_id": 1,
  "title": "iPhone 14 Pro",
  "description": "Like new, with box",
  "price": 25000,
  "condition": "used",
  "status": "pending",
  "phone": "+201026272813",
  "whatsapp_phone": "+201026272813",
  "images": ["marketplace/listing1.jpg"],
  "is_active": true,
  "publish_at": null,
  "expires_at": null
}

request.description: JSON only. **condition:** `new` | `used`. **status (optional):** `pending` | `active` | `sold` | `hidden` | `rejected`. **images:** array of string paths (`max:500` each), not multipart files.
**condition:** `new` | `used`. **images:** string paths array. Status changes use Approve/Reject/Hide/Mark Sold endpoints.
**action:** `call` | `whatsapp` (required).

item.name: User
item.description: User APIs under /api/user: public read-only endpoints plus authenticated user account endpoints (register, login, me, update, delete, change password, logout).

formdata.description: Optional. jpeg, jpg, png, gif, webp. Max 5MB.

request.description: Multipart **form-data**. All text fields optional per request rules; **image** is optional file.
Returns JSON with **unread_count** (integer) for the authenticated user. Same Bearer token as **List**.

item.name: Listings
item.description: Public. Returns only approved and active listings.

item.name: My Listings
item.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer {{user_token}}. User's own directory listings (pending until admin approves).

item.name: Job Listing
item.description: Public. List and get active job listings.

item.name: My Jobs
item.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer {{user_token}}. User's own job listings (pending until admin approves).

item.name: Event Listing
item.description: Public. List and get active events.

item.name: My Events
item.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer {{user_token}}. User's own events (pending until admin approves).

request.description: No body fields required. Increments click counter for the visible ad.

item.name: Support Tickets
item.description:
List, get, add log require auth. Create: one endpoint — no token = guest (visitor_name + visitor_phone or visitor_email + message); with Bearer token = user (message only).

Keys — status: open | in_progress | closed. priority: low | normal | high.

header.description: Optional. Remove/disable for guest ticket; keep for authenticated user (message + files only).

formdata.description: Guest only: required with visitor_phone or visitor_email.
Optional files: jpeg, jpg, png, gif, webp, pdf. Max 5MB each.

request.description:
Multipart **form-data**.

**Authenticated:** enable Authorization header; send **message** + optional **attachments[]** files.

**Guest:** disable Authorization; send **visitor_name**, **visitor_phone** or **visitor_email**, **message**, optional **attachments[]**.

See `postman/API_FIELD_VALUES.md`.

formdata.description: User logs use type `comment` only in practice; server sets log type.
Optional files: jpeg, jpg, png, gif, webp, pdf. Max 5MB each.

request.description: Multipart **form-data**. Either **message** or **attachments[]** required. Ticket must not be **closed**.
No body. Listing must be **active** and visible. Increments whatsapp_clicks.
No body. Listing must be **active**. Increments calls_clicks.

item.name: My Listings
item.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer {{user_token}}. Log in as user first.

request.description: **condition:** `new` | `used`. **images:** string paths array. Optional **status** per API rules.
**condition:** `new` | `used`. **images:** string paths.
**action:** `call` | `whatsapp`. Response includes `url` (tel: or wa.me).
**status:** `open` | `full` | `closed` | `expired` (optional; defaults to open).
**status:** `open` | `full` | `closed` | `expired`.
